hook: Sessions bind identity to requests after initial authentication.
cta: Rotate session secrets and enforce secure cookie attributes.

storyboardBeats.objective: Show why stateful sessions remain common in web apps.
User authenticates and receives a session identifier.
Browser stores HttpOnly session cookie for subsequent requests.
Server validates session before granting protected resources.
Session expiry and logout invalidate active credentials.

narrationPlaceholders.scriptIntent: Show why stateful sessions remain common in web apps.
User authenticates and receives a session identifier.
Browser stores HttpOnly session cookie for subsequent requests.
Server validates session before granting protected resources.
Session expiry and logout invalidate active credentials.

transitionToNext.rationale: Authenticated sessions rely on certificate trust for transport security.
